name: Chunky Kidney Bean Dip
recipeInstructions:
1. Mash the beans by hand, using a fork or the back of a wooden spoon.
2. Blend in the sour cream, mixing until smooth. Add all the other ingredients and blend well.
3. Cover and chill. Makes about 1 3/4 cups of dip.
Suggested Dippers: Polish Sausage, Celery, Corn Crackers
